title: Push Date Automation not working
excerpt: This automation is not populating the push date for the SLA column. What am I doing wrong?

posts.author: nancibee (NancyBaunis)
posts.cookedHtml:
This automation is not populating the push date for the SLA column. What am I doing wrong?

monday screenshot automation1238×219 20.1 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
You need to actually do the following recipe:

image1289×154 20.7 KB

The reason is, that SLA Date needs a date in it first, before it can be pushed. So you need to set it to today AND then push it.

posts.author: nancibee (NancyBaunis)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s kind of what I figured after I posted but thank you so much for confirming. Worked like a charm!

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having similar issues when pushing create item on a different board. I would like to try your suggestion by adding “set date submitted,” to the formula where the red dot is in the attached photo. Is there a way to do this without having to delete the rest of the formula I already made? Formulas can take a long time & I don’t want to start over.

image1066×497 33.3 KB

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I tried telling the automation to set the date, and then push to the second board. Unfortunately, the date is still not showing up on the second board.
